mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customers WHERE CAST(created_date AS DATE) = CURRENT_DATE
AND branch_seq = #{branchSeq}

SELECT COALESCE(mci.remaining_count_sms, 0) FROM mymunja_config_info mci INNER JOIN "branch-third-party-mapping" btpm ON mci.mapping_id = btpm.mapping_seq INNER JOIN third_party_services tps ON btpm.third_party_id = tps.seq INNER JOIN external_service_type est ON tps.code_seq = est.seq WHERE btpm.branch_id = #{branchSeq} AND est.code_name = 'SMS' LIMIT 1

SELECT COALESCE(mci.remaining_count_lms, 0) FROM mymunja_config_info mci INNER JOIN "branch-third-party-mapping" btpm ON mci.mapping_id = btpm.mapping_seq INNER JOIN third_party_services tps ON btpm.third_party_id = tps.seq INNER JOIN external_service_type est ON tps.code_seq = est.seq WHERE btpm.branch_id = #{branchSeq} AND est.code_name = 'SMS' LIMIT 1
